title: neottia adnata
intro: Neottia adnata, also known as the Asian ladies' tresses or Chinese ladies' tresses, is a type of orchid native to Asia and is characterized by its yellowish-green flowers and long, thin leaves. Traditionally, Neottia adnata has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Neottia adnata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
